items.$comment: This enum is the authoritative domain vocabulary. Matches catalog.schema.json. Add values here and there together.

domain.description: Astrophysical domain tags. Must match the enum defined in catalog.schema.json. Selection qualifiers are not domain tags.

upstream_catalogs.description: IDs of the upstream catalog manifests this validation set draws from. Each value must match the id field of a manifest in observables/*/catalogs/.

unit.$comment: 'source-native' is an accepted deferral for observables whose units depend on the upstream calibration system and have not yet been normalized. It must not appear on any observable in a validation set with status 'available'. Phase 2 adapter work on source-native observables is gated on resolving the unit and adding it to this enum. See ADR-0002.
unit.description: Unit for this observable. Must be one of the values in the enum. Use 'source-native' only as a placeholder when the unit requires a Phase 1 units-policy decision to resolve.

build_plan.$comment: Planning record for how this validation set will be built. This is NOT artifact provenance. Artifact provenance lives in sidecar YAML records carrying content hashes, adapter script references, upstream release pins, and generation dates. build_plan records intent, not reproducibility.

planned_from.description: Repository-relative paths to the catalog manifests this validation set is planned to be built from. These are planning pointers only — they tell reviewers which upstream catalogs are relevant, not how the artifact was produced. The test suite verifies these paths resolve to existing files.

requires_rebuild.description: True when the validation artifact does not yet exist or is known to be out of date with the planned_from sources. False when the artifact has been built and verified. This flag is set manually by the adapter author; automated rebuild detection is deferred to Phase 1.
